prompt: A cinematic vertical sci-fi poster set on a rooftop observation deck above a vast futuristic megacity at sunset, viewed from behind. In the foreground, 2 central figures stand side by side: a tall adult man in a fitted dark business suit, black shoes, and white shirt, seen from the back, and a glowing translucent blue female humanoid AI hologram with a slim body made of light particles, wireframe lines, and constellation-like nodes. The human stands confidently facing the skyline, while the holographic AI raises one hand and projects a luminous holographic city blueprint made of neon-blue architectural outlines and transparent UI panels. The man holds 1 glowing golden octagonal device in his left hand, designed like a compass or navigation emblem with bright radial lines. The city is dense with skyscrapers, aerial traffic, digital billboards, and cyberpunk lighting in blue, cyan, and magenta accents; 1 flying car is visible on the right side. The sky transitions from warm orange sunlight near the horizon to deep blue night above, with dramatic clouds and a high-tech optimistic atmosphere. Add 4 major holographic interface clusters: 1 large projected city model above the AI’s hand, 1 mid-center analytics panel with charts and circular diagrams, 1 upper-right transparent data screen, and 1 lower-right billboard-like screen showing large “AI” text. At the top center, place a huge futuristic framed headline in bold glowing Chinese characters with metallic white-gold lettering: 智能体时代：想象定边界，行动决胜负。. The composition should feel visionary, corporate, inspirational, and premium, with ultra-detailed lighting, reflective wet rooftop surfaces, volumetric glow, sharp focus, epic scale, and polished gpt-image-2 poster aesthetics.
